subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness unto the oneness of God and His singleness, unto His grandeur and His sovereignty, His glory and His power, and His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بوحدانیتة الله و فردانیته و بعظمته و سلطانه و عزه و اقتداره و علمه
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
